title: Fuengirola Catamaran Charter Sunset: Prices & Tips for 2026
html:
Fuengirola catamaran charter at sunset offers one of the Costa del Sol's most memorable experiences, departing from Puerto Deportivo de Fuengirola from around €80 per person. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Fuengirola or list your own.

How much does it cost to charter a catamaran at sunset in Fuengirola?

Prices for a sunset catamaran charter in Fuengirola typically range from €80 to €200 per person for a shared tour. Private charters for up to 12 guests cost between €800 and €1,500 for a three-hour evening sail. BoatHire24 lets you compare verified boat listings, including the Sanyati, for sunset slots. Compare prices and availability on the yacht charter in Fuengirola page to find the best deal.

Which boat to rent for a sunset cruise in Fuengirola?

  1. Sanyati Leopard 51ft catamaran: ideal for a luxury group charter, sleeps 10 guests, from €1,200 per three-hour sunset trip. See full details on the Sanyati charter page.
  2. Azimut 55 flybridge motor yacht: perfect for a fast sunset escape, up to 12 guests, from €1,000 per half-day.
  3. Lagoon 450 catamaran: spacious and stable, recommended for families, 8 guests, from €800 for two hours.
  4. Axopar 45 open console: best for an adventurous sunset, up to 8 guests, from €600 for a two-hour run.

Where to set off in Fuengirola?

Most sunset charters depart from Puerto Deportivo de Fuengirola, the main marina in the town centre. Nearby options include Puerto Banús in Marbella, 14 nautical miles west, and the smaller Puerto de la Duquesa, 30 miles south-west. The bay of Fuengirola itself offers a sheltered anchorage off the beach of Los Boliches, while the headland at Calaburras provides a scenic viewpoint. Some operators also pick up from the harbour at Mijas Costa, which lies within the municipality.

Sunset boat costs in Fuengirola

  • Shared sunset tour (catamaran): from €80 per person, includes light refreshments.
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 6 guests): from €250, self-drive with a licence.
  • Catamaran full-day charter (up to 12 guests): from €1,500, includes skipper and fuel.
  • Crewed yacht sunset charter (up to 8 guests): from €900 for two hours, with champagne and canapés.

Season and licence requirements

The high season for sunset charters in Fuengirola runs from June to September, when the evening temperatures are warm and the sea is calm. The local Poniente wind often dies down after 4pm, making for a smooth sail. For licence, Spain requires a recreational boating licence (PER) for boats over 15 horsepower, but operators will confirm exact requirements for each vessel. BoatHire24 listings specify whether a licence is needed or a skipper is included. BoatHire24 ensures all listings are verified.

Local tip: Book your sunset charter for 7.30pm in July to catch the sun dipping behind the mountains above Mijas.

At a glance

  • Price band: €80 to €1,500 per trip
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Trip length: 2 to 4 hours at sunset
  • Capacity: up to 12 guests on standard catamarans
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Fuengirola

Can I rent a boat for sunset without a licence in Fuengirola?

Yes, you can hire a boat with a skipper for a sunset cruise, which does not require any personal licence; the operator holds the necessary certifications.

What is the best month for a catamaran sunset in Fuengirola?

July and August offer the latest sunsets, around 9.30pm, and the calmest sea conditions for a stable catamaran ride.

Are sunset charters suitable for children in Fuengirola?

Catamarans are very stable and family-friendly, and many operators welcome children on board; check the specific boat listing for age policies.

How early should I book a sunset boat in Fuengirola?

To guarantee a spot in high season 2026, book at least two to four weeks in advance, especially for private charters on popular catamarans like the Sanyati.

Whether you are planning a romantic evening or a group celebration, a sunset catamaran charter in Fuengirola is a reliable way to enjoy the Costa del Sol coastline. Explore available boats and book online through the BoatHire24 marketplace. Owners can also list their own boats to reach thousands of travellers.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Fuengirola and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
